CustomField.description: Creating for reporting purposes.If the SaaS Activation Date is not blank, the formula will compare that date with the latest threshold date. If the SaaS Activation Date is equal to the latest threshold met date, the formula returns TRUE. Otherwise, it returns FALSE. If the Date of Activation is blank, it returns NO SAAS ACTIVATION DATE.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(SaaS_Activation_Date_2024__c), "No SaaS Activation Date", IF( DATEVALUE(SaaS_Activation_Date_2024__c) = DATEVALUE( IF( DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c), SaaS_Adding_Students_Stage_Met_Date__c, IF( DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c), SaaS_Adding_Parents_Stage_Met_Date__c, IF( DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c), SaaS_Adding_Staff_Stage_Met_Date__c, IF( DATEVALUE(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c), SaaS_Staff_Logging_In_Stage_Met_Date__c, IF( DATEVALUE(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) && DATEVALUE(SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c), SaaS_Parents_Signing_Up_Stage_Met_Date__c, IF( DATEVALUE(SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) > DATEVALUE(SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c), SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c, SaaS_Logging_Activities_Stage_Met_Date__c ) ) ) ) ) ) ), "true", "false" ) )
CustomField.label: SaaS MAX Of Threshold
